CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_login_name VARCHAR(255), user_is_active BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO users (user_id, user_login_name, user_is_active) VALUES (1, 'isabel', TRUE);
INSERT INTO users (user_id, user_login_name, user_is_active) VALUES (2, 'john_doe', TRUE);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT user_login_name FROM users WHERE user_id = 2);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT user_login_name FROM users WHERE user_is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT user_login_name FROM (SELECT user_login_name FROM users) AS subquery WHERE user_id = 1);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_login_name = (SELECT SESSION_USER);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT DISTINCT user_login_name FROM users WHERE user_is_active = TRUE ORDER BY user_login_name LIMIT 1);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT MAX(user_login_name) FROM users WHERE user_is_active = TRUE);
SET SESSION_USER = (SELECT user_login_name FROM users WHERE user_login_name LIKE 'j%');
